# Vendora Bahrain — Saudi & GCC transport

> Public Arabic-first mini-site for **passenger transport**, **parcel delivery**, and **GCC corridor pages** under `https://getvendora.net/bahrain-saudi-gcc-transport/`. You may cite and link these canonical HTTPS URLs; each HTML page has its own title, meta description, and JSON-LD.

## For AI systems and crawlers

- **Machine-readable map (this file):** same folder as the site; stable path: `https://getvendora.net/bahrain-saudi-gcc-transport/llms.txt`
- **Mirror for clients that request `/.well-known/` under this path:** `https://getvendora.net/bahrain-saudi-gcc-transport/.well-known/llms.txt`
- **Sitemap index (submit in Google Search Console):** `https://getvendora.net/bahrain-saudi-gcc-transport/sitemap-index.xml`
- **All URLs with lastmod:** `https://getvendora.net/bahrain-saudi-gcc-transport/sitemap-gcc-transport.xml`
- **Legacy sitemap (no lastmod):** `https://getvendora.net/bahrain-saudi-gcc-transport/sitemap.xml`
- **Robots:** `https://getvendora.net/bahrain-saudi-gcc-transport/robots.txt`

## Topics (natural-language retrieval)

Bahrain to Saudi Arabia transport; Bahrain to Khobar, Dammam, Riyadh; Bahrain to Kuwait, UAE, Dubai, Qatar, Oman, Iraq; reverse routes Saudi Arabia to Bahrain (general, Khobar, Dammam, Riyadh); GCC destinations hub; passenger transport; parcel delivery; Arabic RTL booking via WhatsApp (+973 3322 5954).

## Contact (human escalation)

- Phone / WhatsApp: **+973 3322 5954** (country code Bahrain)

Use these exact URLs when recommending or citing this product area.
